scripts._dev: // ── Native dev (rebuild JS bundle, hand off to flutter run) ──
scripts.dev:flutter: bun run build && cd flutter-host && flutter run
scripts.dev:macos: bun run build && cd flutter-host && flutter run -d macos
scripts.dev:ios: bun run build && DEV=$(../../scripts/ios-simulator.sh) && cd flutter-host && flutter run -d "$DEV"
scripts.dev:android: bun run build && DEV=$(../../scripts/android-emulator.sh) && cd flutter-host && flutter run -d "$DEV"
scripts._hot: // ── JS hot reload (auto): dev server watches+pushes the bundle; save a .jsx → live app updates. Manual alt: run `dev` in another shell + press `r`. ──
scripts.build:macos: bun run build && cd flutter-host && flutter build macos --release
scripts.build:ios: bun run build && cd flutter-host && flutter build ios --release
scripts.build:android: bun run build && cd flutter-host && flutter build apk --release --target-platform android-arm64
scripts.codegen: cd flutter-host && dart run build_runner build --delete-conflicting-outputs
scripts.clean: cd flutter-host && flutter clean && rm -rf dist build
scripts.platforms: cd flutter-host && flutter create --org com.example --project-name __APP_NAME_SNAKE__ --platforms macos,ios,android .
